hero.title: Control your dynamic screens with ease
hero.subtitle: Manage slideshows, media, and accounts from an intuitive interface. Deploy in one click.

sections.dashboardDesc: A modular dashboard with widgets you can add, remove, and rearrange freely.
sections.mediaDesc: Add your images, videos, and GIFs, adjust durations, and organize the playback order.
sections.slideshowDesc: Preview the slideshow generated from the media you just configured in real time.
sections.accountsDesc: Create admin or user accounts with granular permissions per folder and screen.

pricing.title: Simple and transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs. Upgrade anytime.

checkout.title: Create your instance
checkout.slugInvalid: Invalid format (lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens)
checkout.emailTaken: This email is already in use.
checkout.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
checkout.deployingDesc: Your instance is being created. This may take a few minutes.
checkout.genericError: Unable to create the instance. Please try again.

login.title: Sign in
login.notFound: No instance is associated with this email.
